items.titolo: RAI presenta UMV, il robot su due ruote rapido e agile tra gli ostacoli
items.descrizione: Un robot su due ruote resta in equilibrio, accelera e supera ostacoli.

items.titolo: I tried Gemini's Personal Intelligence, and it was accurate in a useful (but unsettling) way
items.descrizione: I gave Gemini's hyper-personalized mode a test drive and was shocked by how much it knew about me. However, it was surprisingly useful.

items.titolo: Justice Department Says Anthropic Can’t Be Trusted With Warfighting Systems
items.descrizione: In response to Anthropic’s lawsuit, the government said it lawfully penalized the company for trying to limit how its Claude AI models could be used by the military.
